3042116.title: The man who killed james bond
3042116.description: Fabrizio is a petty thief from St. Basil, a seedy suburb in Rome. He is finally facing the man who ruined his life, James Bond. The fascinating British spy was an idol for Fabrizio, who didn't miss any of his countless action movies.
